name: Sourdough Banana Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the pancake mix with an equal amount of buttermilk and skim milk combined to achieve the desired thickness (not too thin).
2. In a pan or griddle, ladle the batter.
3. Place thinly sliced bananas on the uncooked side of the batter.
4. Cook until the bottom is nearly browned.
5. Flip the pancakes carefully when ready.
6. Serve without syrup; use only margarine or butter to enhance the slightly sour flavor desired.
